required_preferences.fact: Pauses hands-on onboarding for new hires, shifting all training documentation to written guides and FAQs until the crisis response concludes — onboarding support is limited to urgent security protocols only

supersedes.fact: Requires every new hire to complete hands-on troubleshooting scenarios during onboarding — never relies solely on written training materials

required_preferences.fact: Alternates between ticket triage and backend server monitoring during mornings — can no longer focus exclusively on ticket triage before noon, multitasks as required by new role demands

supersedes.fact: Handles morning ticket triage in strict priority order and refuses to multitask during triage — never lets non-urgent tickets distract her before noon

required_preferences.fact: Watches daytime TV or streams shows during downtime for distraction and rest, temporarily relaxing her usual evening-only streaming rule
Consults systems admin team for troubleshooting complex server issues before escalating—now prioritizes collaborative problem-solving over solo investigation
Schedules monthly neurologist follow-up visits as a non-negotiable self-care activity; never allows work or family obligations to interfere with these appointments
Uses blue-light glasses whenever working on a computer — never accesses screens without them

persona: A mid-career helpdesk technician working in a university IT department
